vendors.name: NOX Metals
vendors.tagline: Quotes in milliseconds. Metal on your dock next day.

npc.name: Dana from NOX
voice: NOX Metals — what are we cutting today?
6061 I can have on your dock tomorrow. 4140 pre-hard, give me three days.
You want certs with that? Aerospace work, you'd better say yes.
Prices moved this week. Steel's up. Aluminum's holding.

mechanics.orderFlow: planning desk -> NOX catalog -> pick material/size/qty -> pay -> lead time in ticks -> delivery event at receiving dock
mechanics.leadTimes: in-stock items fast; specials slow; rush option costs 1.5x
mechanics.certs: NOX includes mill certs FREE (matches real offering). Legacy vendor charges +10% and 2x lead for certs. Aero jobs rejected without certs.
mechanics.priceDrift: seeded weekly +-8% drift per family; teaches buying ahead vs cash flow
mechanics.wrongMaterial: using wrong alloy for a job = guaranteed scrap at inspection + Zach root-cause dialog
mechanics.instantQuote: NOX-NET terminal returns price instantly (NESTING... animation, <1s). Legacy vendor = phone-tag minigame: quote arrives after 300-900 ticks.
mechanics.cutToSize: NOX ships plate cut to job dimensions - skips the saw station entirely for those jobs (real time saved, teachable).

realCompany.status: REAL COMPANY - partnership sign-off required before shipping
realCompany.facts: AI-powered supplier; aluminum plate/bar cut to size (6061/7075/7050/5000-series), Inconel & stainless by request; instant quotes; next-day delivery; DFARS; mill certs included
realCompany.gameAlignment: Their stated mission is to reindustrialize America - same name as the game. Co-marketing candidate.

vendors.name: Legacy Metal Service Center
vendors.tagline: Leave a message after the tone.

npc.name: Gus
voice: Yeah we got that. Probably. Lemme check the yard.
Quote? Fax machine's down. Call back Thursday.
Certs cost extra. Everything costs extra.

mechanics.orderFlow: phone-tag minigame: request quote -> wait 300-900 ticks -> price arrives (sometimes wrong alloy)
mechanics.teaches: why the old material pipeline bleeds shops dry - the contrast IS the lesson (and the co-marketing)
